## ShinRacer {{VERSION}}

### What's new
- (fill in before publishing)

### Install
Two installers are attached below, built from the same code:
- **ShinRacer Setup {{VERSION}}.exe** — the full app: servers, events, mods, comms, traffic, stats, telemetry, the Cluster Fucker, and everything else.
- **ShinRacer Lite Setup {{VERSION}}.exe** — a lighter build for crew who just want servers/events, mods, comms, and traffic management, without the rest of the app's surface area.

Download whichever one you want and run it. No other software required — either installer bundles the backend client, so there's nothing else to build or configure locally.

### Sign in
ShinRacer now requires a Google sign-in on first launch — this is how the crew's roles (Admin/Host/Crew) work. Ask William to add your Google account to the crew list if you get an "access restricted" screen. See [docs/FRIEND_SETUP.md](https://github.com/ShinobiFPV/ShinRacer/blob/main/docs/FRIEND_SETUP.md).

### Connect
This build is pre-configured for the ShinTech crew backend. Make sure you're on Tailscale before launching.

### Requirements
- Windows 10/11 x64
- Assetto Corsa (optional — needed for server hosting and lap stats)

### Auto-update
ShinRacer will automatically detect this release and prompt users to update
on next launch. Users on older builds will see the update banner within 4
hours, or immediately on restart.
